speaker: Celio
text: Oh, hello, Argo.

speaker: Argo
text: I haven't seen you in a while, Professor Celio.

speaker: Argo
text: Are you on your lunch break? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: That’s right, I’m enjoying my after-meal tea. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Wow, so classy.

speaker: Celio
text: You think so? Would you like to drink some with me? *eats*

speaker: Argo
text: Well, since you’re offering…

speaker: Argo
text: I was so nervous during my audience with Lord Scheat.

speaker: Celio
text: He loves to play around, doesn't he? You must have been quite surprised. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I can’t believe a dragon did that to me…

speaker: Celio
text: He instructed me not say anything beforehand. My apologies.

speaker: Argo
text: Ahaha...

speaker: Celio
text: But he said he could sense the quality of your E.P. by touching you, after all.

speaker: Argo
text: Is that true?

speaker: Argo
text: But... I don’t think these cards are that great of an ability.

speaker: Argo
text: All they do is let me know when someone is somewhere or that something is going to happen...

speaker: Argo
text: Abilities like the one you have are much more impressive...

speaker: Celio
text: That is because your E.P. hasn't matured enough yet. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: E.P…… can mature…? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Much like our bodies, our E.P.s has been growing ever since they were born. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: I think your E.P. still has a lot of potential, Argo.

speaker: Argo
text: I see... That’s a relief to hear! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (My ability is going to keep maturing…!)

speaker: Argo
text: By the way, are we allowed to drink alcohol here? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Ahh... I get asked this a lot. It’s prohibited.

speaker: Argo
text: What?

speaker: Celio
text: Alcohol causes problems every year. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "I don't understand why you’re here." *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: It’s not uncommon for even the most well-behaved of students to change when they drink. *

speaker: Celio
text: Due to the small number of professors here, we want to keep the amount of possible trouble as low as we can. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Oh, I see...

speaker: Celio
text: I cannot deny that drinking can be helpful in bonding… but making exceptions would be cumbersome, so we have completely banned it.

speaker: Celio
text: Do you understand why it’s prohibited now? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: There will be a punishment if you are found drinking an alcoholic beverage you got somewhere, okay?

speaker: Argo
text: A—A punishment…

speaker: Celio
text: Please forget about drinking and focus on your training.

speaker: Argo
text: I—I will... *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Um, Professor... I saw something when you were in the bath earlier.* *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Huh...!? What was it? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: The tattoo on your left hand…

speaker: Celio
text: "Don’t you dare look at me like that." *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: You know what I’m talking about… right? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: ...What do you mean? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Huh? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: A tattoo? I have no such thing.

speaker: Argo
text: But...

speaker: Celio
text: I. Do. Not. Have. One.

speaker: Argo
text: I saw it with my own eyes!

speaker: Celio
text: Do you have proof? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What!?

speaker: Celio
text: Did you take a picture of it? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: No... Of course I wouldn’t! I was in a changing room!

speaker: Celio
text: You are a good boy who knows his manners, so of course you wouldn’t *sigh*.

speaker: Argo
text: Yes... You’re right.

speaker: Celio
text: Hmhmhm. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (But it’s beyond suspicious when he gets so mad and defensive like that…)

speaker: Argo
text: Well, if you’ll excuse me, I should get going soon.

speaker: Celio
text: All right, see you later.
